cot_prefix: Okay, so Thomas went to the football field today. The question is asking between what times could he have gone there. Let me try to figure this out. Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. 4. Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. 5. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm. 6. Kimberly saw Thomas buying a bike at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. 7. The football field was closed after 9pm. We need to find the time interval when Thomas could have gone to the football field. Since the football field was closed after 9pm, Thomas must have gone before 9pm.
